en: Any arseholes you got a soft spot for Definitely a Karen I feel like they say what you're all thinking but you're too afraid
ko: 좋아하는 나쁜 놈 유형 있어? 확실히 카렌이야. 다들 생각하지만 말 못 하는 걸 말하거든.

en: to say I was in A E once and we were genuinely there for like 40 days 40 nights And this one
ko: 응급실에 갔는데 진짜 40일 40밤을 기다렸어. 옆에 여자가 일어나서

en: woman just got up next to me and was like these are waiting times And I was actually like yeah I'm on your side
ko: "이 대기 시간이 뭐야"라고 했는데 속으로 네 편이다 했어.

en: And then she started talking about immigrants and I thought we've gone off topic But her original point I thought correct
ko: 근데 이민자 얘기를 하기 시작해서 주제에서 벗어났다고 생각했어. 하지만 원래 요점은 맞았어.

en: Well the reason for the waiting times is because we've sent immigrants back Yeah
ko: 대기 시간이 긴 이유는 이민자들을 돌려보냈기 때문이야.

en: That's who was staffing the NHS That's what he was saying these f immigrants we need them back Yes
ko: NHS를 운영하던 사람들이거든. 이 빌어먹을 이민자들이 필요하다는 거야.
